catalog.title: MIGAC Premium Crystal Crafts B2B Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Excellence in Every Crystal - Global Wholesale Solutions

product_series.description: Transform any venue into a breathtaking spectacle with our premium K9 crystal candelabras. Meticulously handcrafted to perfection, each piece delivers unparalleled brilliance and sophistication. Perfect for luxury weddings, high-end hotel banquets, and exclusive events where excellence is non-negotiable.

products.name: Classic 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: A masterpiece of crystal craftsmanship, featuring 5 perfectly balanced arms adorned with sparkling K9 crystals. The classic design radiates sophistication, making it the centerpiece of any luxury event.

products.name: Elegant 7-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Elevate your event with this magnificent 7-arm candelabra. The extended arm configuration creates a dramatic lighting effect, while the premium crystals cast mesmerizing reflections that captivate every guest.

products.name: Luxury 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: A premium interpretation of the classic design, featuring enhanced crystal density and superior craftsmanship. Perfect for venues that demand nothing less than extraordinary.

products.name: Premium 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Featuring our highest quality crystals and meticulous hand-polishing, this candelabra represents the pinnacle of crystal craftsmanship. Every facet catches and reflects light with stunning precision.

products.name: Premium 5-Arm Black Candelabra
products.description: A striking variant featuring black crystal that creates a mysterious, sophisticated ambiance. Perfect for modern venues seeking a bold, contemporary aesthetic that still retains classic luxury.

products.name: Standard 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Delivering premium quality at competitive pricing. This candelabra maintains our high standards of crystal clarity and craftsmanship while offering exceptional value for budget-conscious buyers.

products.name: Medium 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Perfectly sized for medium venues requiring impactful yet manageable decor. The 100cm height strikes an ideal balance between presence and proportion.

products.name: Large 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Standing tall at 120cm, this candelabra makes an unforgettable statement. The extended height and crystal density create a dazzling display that transforms ordinary spaces into extraordinary venues.

products.name: Classic 5-Arm Candelabra II
products.description: An evolution of our classic design, incorporating refined proportions and enhanced crystal arrangements. Perfect for traditional venues seeking contemporary sophistication.

products.name: Tall 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Designed for venues requiring elevated staging while maintaining classic elegance. The 116cm height provides excellent visibility without overwhelming the space.

products.name: Compact 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Optimized for venues with limited space but uncompromising standards. The 79cm height and 54cm width deliver maximum impact in minimal footprint.

products.name: Standard 5-Arm Candelabra III
products.description: Our most versatile design, offering perfect proportions that complement any venue style. The 90cm height and 50cm width provide ideal balance and visual harmony.

products.name: Wide 5-Arm Candelabra
products.description: Featuring an extended 63cm width, this candelabra creates dramatic visual impact in larger venues. The wide arm spacing ensures maximum light distribution and crystal visibility.

products.name: Grand 12-Arm Candelabra
products.description: A monumental masterpiece featuring 12 arms of crystal perfection. Standing nearly 2 meters tall, this candelabra is reserved for the most prestigious events and venues that demand nothing but the extraordinary.

products.name: Majestic 9-Arm Candelabra
products.description: The perfect balance between elegance and scale. 9 arms of crystal brilliance create a stunning focal point without overwhelming the space. Ideal for medium to large venues seeking premium aesthetics.

product_series.description: Elevate floral arrangements with our crystal flower stands. Each stand is engineered to showcase flowers with maximum impact, creating stunning visual displays that enhance any venue's aesthetic appeal.

products.name: Mini Crystal Flower Stand
products.description: Perfect for small arrangements and intimate venues. The 50cm height provides elegant elevation for delicate floral displays while maintaining stability and crystal clarity.

products.name: Compact Crystal Flower Stand
products.description: Optimized for venues requiring elegant floral displays with minimal footprint. The 50cm height delivers visual impact while conserving valuable space.

products.name: Standard Crystal Flower Stand
products.tagline: Perfect Balance for Any Floral Display
products.description: The industry standard for crystal flower stands. At 73cm, this versatile piece accommodates a wide range of floral arrangements while maintaining crystal-perfect clarity and stability.

products.name: Tall Crystal Flower Stand
products.description: Standing tall at 104cm, this flower stand creates dramatic height in floral arrangements. Perfect for hotel lobbies, wedding venues, and large event spaces requiring elevated displays.

product_series.description: Compact yet captivating, our crystal candle holders deliver premium aesthetics for intimate settings. Perfect for restaurants, cafes, and elegant dining experiences where sophistication matters.

products.name: Single Crystal Candle Holder
products.description: A timeless design featuring premium crystal clarity. Perfect for creating intimate ambiance in dining settings, restaurants, and special events.

products.name: Single Crystal Candle Holder II
products.description: A single, perfectly formed crystal candle holder that exudes elegance. The minimalist design allows the crystal's natural brilliance to take center stage, creating an intimate and sophisticated ambiance.

products.name: Multi-Layer Candle Holder
products.description: Featuring multiple crystal layers that create stunning light refraction patterns. Perfect for venues seeking dramatic table lighting with crystal elegance.

products.name: Petite Crystal Candle Holder
products.description: A compact design perfect for small tables and intimate settings. The petite size delivers crystal elegance without overwhelming the space.

product_series.description: Transform ordinary desserts into extraordinary presentations with our crystal cake stands. Each tier is designed to showcase cakes and pastries with maximum visual impact, creating memorable dining experiences.

products.name: 3-Tier Crystal Cake Stand
products.description: The perfect showcase for wedding cakes and elaborate dessert displays. Three tiers of crystal clarity create a stunning centerpiece that elevates any celebration.

products.name: 5-Tier Crystal Cake Stand
products.description: A monumental display piece for the most prestigious events. Five tiers create a dramatic dessert presentation that commands attention and admiration from every guest.

products.name: 3-Tier Crystal Cake Stand II
products.description: An evolution of our classic design, featuring enhanced tier spacing and improved stability. Perfect for modern weddings and contemporary events seeking crystal elegance.
